name: Sour Cream Tortilla Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onion in 2 tablespoons salad oil until tender.
2. Add tomatoes, seasoning mix and salsa jalapena, breaking up tomatoes. Bring mixture to a boil; reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, for 15 to 20 minutes. Set aside to cool.
3. Fry tortillas lightly in a small amount of oil, 10 to 15 seconds on each side. (Do not let them get crisp.)
4. Pour half the sauce into the bottom of a 13x9x2-inch baking dish.
5. Arrange a layer of tortillas over the sauce.
6. Top with about one-third of the sauce, onions and cheese.
7. Repeat the procedure twice, making three layers of tortillas.
8. Combine sour cream and seasoned salt; spread over cheese to edges of dish.
9. Sprinkle lightly with seasoned pepper.
10. Bake, uncovered, in a preheated 325°F oven for 25 to 30 minutes.
11. To serve, cut into squares.
